context: Grading system of hydronephrosis by US: Grade 0   =   homogeneous central renal sinus complex without separation of central sinus echoes Grade 1   =   separation of central sinus echoes of ovoid configuration; continuous echogenic sinus periphery; 52% predictive value for obstruction Grade 2   =   separation of central sinus echoes of rounded configuration; dilated calices connecting with renal pelvis; continuity of echogenic sinus periphery Grade 3   =   replacement of major portions of renal sinus; discontinuity of echogenic sinus periphery Amount of collecting system dilatation depends on:
